modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Uncertainty about installing 32-bit or 64-bit DocuSign driver on Windows 11.

full_description_text:
- The user is attempting to update the DocuSign print driver on a Windows 11 system.  
- They are unsure whether to install the 32-bit or 64-bit version of the driver.  
- This confusion may stem from the system architecture or compatibility considerations.  
- Clarification on the appropriate driver version is needed to proceed with the installation.
